creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #15)
The original problem mentioned in the title is fixed.
However, firefox still uses too much CPU in my opinion (~70% for the mentioned video). If I play the same video using mpv, it uses single digit percent. So this bug may still be relevant.
On the other hand, this seems to be an upstream problem.
